purpose: Per-service reference for src/server/services/: DashboardService (CRUD + file I/O), WatcherService (hybrid fs.watch + fs.watchFile + reconciliation + write rejection), DependencyService (graph resolution), ArchiveService, HistoryService, QueueService, plus SSEManager and the validation utility (validateDependencyGraph using Kahn's algorithm).
gotchas: WatcherService rejects task_id/dashboard_id mismatches with a write_rejected SSE event
Reconciliation interval (5s) is a safety net — fs.watch can miss events
computeNewlyUnblocked is incremental; do not call full graph scan on every completion
Validation runs in master agent (planning), not in server runtime
patterns: Hybrid file-watch strategy (fs.watch + fs.watchFile + periodic reconcile)
SSE broadcast with optional per-client dashboard filter
conventions: All file paths absolute via constants.js
